extortion.description: COIN is your hands-on partner for IT Continuity, Disaster & Workplace Recovery, and Cyber Security. The fast increase of, for instance, the volume of cyber / ransomware incidents, power cuts and other disasters, is forcing organisations to closely examine their critical digital company processes, secure their data and ensure the continuous availability of quantitative and qualitative human resources, preferably redundant.Services:Cyber response, SOC and SIEM As A Service, Data protection and data management
